policy_contract.policy_matrix_heading: ## Semantic Twin Inventory And Classification Matrix

rule_catalog.summary: semantic-boundary contract and checker drifted out of alignment
a protected semantic-family filename appeared outside the sanctioned path set
franken_node imported another kernel's internal module directly

violations.detail: cancellation_protocol.rs belongs to protected semantic family cancellation-protocol but crates/franken-node/src/runtime/cancellation_protocol.rs is not in the sanctioned path set
violations.remediation: Reuse an existing sanctioned surface or update the semantic-twin matrix and anti-drift checker in the same change.
